Package org.springdoc.core.utils

Class SpringDocHalJacksonModuleUtils

java.lang.Object
org.springdoc.core.utils.SpringDocHalJacksonModuleUtils
public final class SpringDocHalJacksonModuleUtils extends Object
Utility for configuring HalJacksonModule on Jackson ObjectMapper instances.

Provides:

  • configureHalOnBuilder(MapperBuilder) — adds the HAL module and a custom HalPropertyNamingIntrospector to a MapperBuilder.
  • ensureHalModuleRegistered(ObjectMapperProvider) — idempotent helper that rebuilds an ObjectMapperProvider's mapper with the HAL module if not already present.
  • registerHalDirectMixins(MapperBuilder) — registers HAL mixin classes directly on the builder for reliable annotation introspection.
Uses Class.forName instead of direct imports to avoid NoClassDefFoundError when spring-boot-hateoas is optional.

    Configures a MapperBuilder with the HalJacksonModule and a custom HalPropertyNamingIntrospector.

  • Method Details

    • configureHalOnBuilder

      public static tools.jackson.databind.cfg.MapperBuilder<tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper,?> configureHalOnBuilder(tools.jackson.databind.cfg.MapperBuilder<tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper,?> builder)
      Configures a MapperBuilder with the HalJacksonModule and a custom HalPropertyNamingIntrospector.

      If the module is not on the classpath, only the introspector is applied. Otherwise, the module is instantiated via reflection, registered, and HAL mixin classes are added directly on the builder.

      Parameters:
      builder - the MapperBuilder to configure
      Returns:
      the configured builder, for chaining

    • ensureHalModuleRegistered

      public static void ensureHalModuleRegistered(ObjectMapperProvider provider)
      Ensures the HalJacksonModule is registered in the mapper from the given provider.

      If the module is not on the classpath or is already registered, does nothing. Otherwise, rebuilds the mapper with the module added and sets it on the provider.

      Parameters:
      provider - the ObjectMapperProvider whose mapper should be updated
